title: Safety and immunogenicity of an inactivated thimerosal-free influenza vaccine in infants and children.
ehr_evidence: None. The study is a prospective, open-label, phase III clinical trial.
summary: A prospective phase III clinical trial evaluating the safety, reactogenicity, and immunogenicity of a thimerosal-free inactivated influenza vaccine (Fluvax/C210) in children aged 6 months to <9 years in Australia.
key_findings: No withdrawals due to adverse events.
Majority of solicited local and systemic adverse events were of mild severity.
Over 95% of both younger and older children achieved seroprotection after dose 2.
study_design: prospective, multi-center, open-label, phase III clinical trial
population: 298 healthy children aged 6 months to <9 years in Australia
